headline: Jim Cramer on Johnson & Johnson: “It’s a Textbook Slowdown Stock”
summary: Johnson & Johnson (NYSE:JNJ) is one of the stocks mentioned during the show, as we cover everything Jim Cramer said about the oversold market. Cramer was quite bullish on the company’s stock, as he stated: Yesterday, we got some terrific news from Johnson & Johnson, but because the tape was so ugly, the stock did […]
